title: Filipino Tiger Prawns in Pinakbet Sauce
description: A flavorful and spicy Filipino-inspired dish featuring tiger prawns in a vibrant pinakbet sauce, made with a variety of vegetables and spices.

ingredients.name: Pinakbet vegetables
ingredients.notes: Combination of eggplant, okra, tomatoes, and long green chili peppers

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the pinakbet vegetables and sauté for 2-3 minutes.
Add the tomato paste and stir to combine.
Add the fish sauce and vinegar, and stir to combine.
Add the tiger prawns and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until pink and cooked through.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
